semantic_fidelity.reason: All core elements are present and correctly linked: worker to drafts to critic to approval decision, with a no-path looping back and a yes-path ending in approved output. Persistence is explicit via repeated role labels and the 'same worker / same critic' framing, though revision is implied by the loop rather than shown as its own step.

one_glance_clarity.reason: The left-to-right flow reads quickly and the approval fork is easy to spot, so the main story is understandable fast. It still crosses the text-heavy threshold: title, subtitle, chips, body copy, and multiple small labels compete for attention, so the full message takes longer than a true five-second glance.

readability_layout.reason: The composition is balanced, text is legible, and there are no obvious overlaps or clipping issues. The main weakness is local crowding around the decision area and the small status labels around the artifact previews, which reduces ease at publication scale.

visual_coherence.reason: Rounded cards, soft neutrals, and consistent accent colors give the figure a deliberate, unified look. It is polished, but the number of accent colors and decorative background blobs add a little visual noise rather than strengthening the core message.

strengths: The approval logic is explicit: a clear yes path exits to approved output, while the no path loops back into revision.
Worker and critic are framed as persistent roles, and the artifact snapshots make iterative improvement concrete.
improvements: Remove or compress explanatory copy so the diagram, not the prose, carries more of the five-second explanation.
Clarify the feedback/revision return path by tying it more directly to the critic or decision diamond and giving the decision zone more space.
review.summary: This is a strong and semantically faithful explainer with solid publication-level structure, but it is still somewhat text-led. Simplifying the copy and cleaning up the decision/feedback area would make the worker-critic loop land more immediately in one glance.
